name: @axal/workers
description: AXAL Cloudflare Workers backend (Hono + D1 + KV + R2 + Resend)

scripts.deploy:staging: npm run build:email && wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply axal-db --remote --env staging
scripts.migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply axal-db --remote --env production
